title: Privacy Policy
description: Privacy Policy for SGIP Real Estate

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: SGIP Real Estate ('we', 'us', 'our', or 'Company') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website sgipreal.com and use our services.

dataCollection.title: 2. Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us and information that is automatically collected when you use our services:
dataCollection.personalInfo: Personal identification information (name, email address, phone number)
dataCollection.propertyPreferences: Property preferences, search history, and interests
dataCollection.websiteUsage: Website usage data, including pages visited, time spent, and interactions
dataCollection.communications: Communications with us, including inquiries, requests, and feedback

dataUsage.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.content: We use the collected information for the following purposes:
dataUsage.propertyServices: To provide, maintain, and improve our real estate services
dataUsage.communication: To communicate with you about properties, services, and inquiries
dataUsage.marketing: To send you marketing communications (with your consent) about properties and services that may interest you
dataUsage.legalCompliance: To comply with legal obligations and regulatory requirements
dataUsage.websiteImprovement: To analyze and improve our website functionality and user experience

dataSharing.title: 4. Information Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.content: We may share your information in the following circumstances:
dataSharing.serviceProviders: With service providers who assist us in operating our website and conducting our business
dataSharing.legalRequirements: When required by law or to respond to legal process
dataSharing.businessTransfers: In connection with any merger, sale, or transfer of assets
dataSharing.consent: With your explicit consent or at your direction

dataSecurity.title: 5. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information:
dataSecurity.encryption: Encryption of sensitive data during transmission and storage
dataSecurity.staffTraining: Staff training on data protection and privacy

yourRights.title: 6. Your Rights (GDPR)
yourRights.content: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights:
yourRights.access: Right to access your personal data
yourRights.correction: Right to rectification of inaccurate data
yourRights.deletion: Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten')
yourRights.objection: Right to object to processing of your personal data
yourRights.withdrawal: Right to withdraw consent at any time

cookies.title: 7. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our website. For detailed information, please see our Cookie Policy.
cookies.analytics: Analytics cookies to understand website usage
cookies.preferences: Preference cookies to remember your settings

dataRetention.title: 8. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.

internationalTransfers.title: 9. International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.content: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country of residence. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your data in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

children.title: 10. Children's Privacy
children.content: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.

changes.title: 11. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the 'Last Updated' date.

contact.title: 12. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact us:
